title: White House taps polarizing Harvard astronomer to lead new UFO council
description: The team’s mission is to investigate the national security implications posed by unidentified flying objects

title: White House picks controversial alien theorist to lead UFO council
description: Cosmologist, Avi Loeb, was chosen to lead a team of scientists to study the national security risks posed by UFOs.

title: Harvard professor with polarizing alien theories is picked to lead new White House UFO council
description: A polarizing Harvard astronomer known for splashy theories about alien visits has been tapped by the White House to lead a team of outside scientists to study the national security risks posed by UFOs.
